hypothesis: The sportsbook closing total is the best baseline forecast for WNBA totals, but rolling team features contain incremental information about the residual error around that line. A model trained on actual_total minus closing_total can identify underpriced UNDER spots more effectively than a direct total prediction model.
core_findings_from_prior_model: model adds value as adjustment to line
strong under tier only positive holdout tier
promotion_focus: UNDER tiers only unless OVER tiers prove non-inverted in validation and holdout
